risks.title: Head of Palestinian soccer not granted US visa to attend World Cup
risks.description: The head of the Palestinian Football Association is waiting in Mexico City for permission to enter the United States with other federation heads attending the 2026 FIFA World Cup. Jibril Rajoub went to the opening match between Mexico and South Africa on Thur…

risks.title: Ahead of World Cup, USMNT's Tim Weah is inspired by Spike Lee, father
risks.description: Timothy Weah speaks on creative directing Electrolit's campaign that will run during the 2026 World Cup while he plays for the United States.

risks.title: USA vs. Paraguay weather for World Cup 2026 group play matchup
risks.description: USMNT will take on Paraguay this Friday. Here's your where to watch, weather, who to watch and more.

risks.title: The US Is Requiring Foreign Influencers to Get Work Visas for the 2026 World Cup
risks.description: FIFA announced agreements with platforms such as TikTok and YouTube that include the participation of dozens of international influencers to generate content in the three host countries.

risks.title: The home World Cup moment has finally arrived for USMNT’s golden generation— and the chance to ‘change soccer here forever’
risks.description: The journey that started eight years ago, and which begins to reach its climax Friday night when the U.S. faces Paraguay at SoFi Stadium, has a more existential purpose.

risks.title: How the Moroccan World Cup Team Became a Symbol of the Global South
risks.description: Dan Greene writes about Morocco’s standing in the 2026 World Cup, where it represents both the Arab world and the African continent, and speaks with Saber Chawni, a Moroccan influencer, about the country’s hopes for the tournament.

risks.title: USA vs Paraguay: World Cup 2026 group match – Trump, schedule, lineups
risks.description: FIFA World Cup cohosts United States begin their campaign against Paraguay, with Donald Trump’s attendance in doubt.

risks.title: World Cup 2026: 20 records that could be broken by Messi, Ronaldo, others
risks.description:
Discover 20 potential World Cup records that could be broken by Lionel Messi, Cristiano Ronaldo, Kylian Mbappe, and top nations at the 2026 tournament.

risks.title: South Korea Nears World Cup Round of 32 with 93% Odds After Czech Republic Win
risks.description: South Korea secured a 2-1 comeback victory over Czech Republic in their 2026 FIFA World Cup opener, enhancing their chances of advancing to the knockout stages.

risks.title: Half-Empty World Cup Stadium Sparks Fresh Backlash Over Sky-High Ticket Costs
risks.description: Swathes of empty seats for the South Korea-Czech Republic game renewed concerns over ticket pricing and demand for the expanded tournament.

risks.title: Canada and Bosnia ready for high-stakes FIFA World Cup clash?
risks.description: Jesse Marsch has a simple message for anyone wondering whether his Canada side are ready for the weight of a home World Cup: they are not just ready for it, they want it.

risks.title: Messi vs Ronaldo: 2026 World Cup Could Deliver Historic Final Clash Between Legends
risks.description: The 2026 FIFA World Cup may host a final showdown between Lionel Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo, as both legends aim for glory in their likely last tournament appearance.

risks.title: Violent scenes as protesters smash truck outside Azteca Stadium in Mexico
risks.description: Mexico’s World Cup opener ended in a 2-0 win over South Africa, but violent scenes outside Estadio Azteca brought a separate flashpoint to opening day. The match itself gave the co-hosts the start they wanted.

risks.title: How to watch World Cup highlights this summer

risks.title: Is Neymar playing vs. Morocco? Latest on Brazil star's injury recovery at World Cup 2026
risks.description: Neymar made his long-awaited return to Brazil's national team squad for the 2026 World Cup, but the superstar forward's injury woes have struck again.

risks.title: World Cup 2026 opening day takeaways: Red cards, VAR and hydration breaks
risks.description: From criticism over water breaks to red cards galore, here's all the buzz from the opening day of the World Cup.

risks.title: Australia Socceroors Names 26-Man Squad for 2026 World Cup with Blend of Youth and Experience
risks.description: Australia reveals its 26-man squad for the 2026 FIFA World Cup, featuring a mix of seasoned veterans and promising young talents, as they prepare for challenging Group D matches.

risks.title: South Korea Stages Impressive Comeback to Defeat Czech Republic 2-1 in World Cup Opener
risks.description: South Korea overcame Czech Republic 2-1 in their 2026 World Cup opener, showcasing resilience and technical skill. Goals from In-Beom Hwang and Hyeon-Gyu Oh secured the comeback victory.

risks.title: As World Cup begins, organizers focus on NJ fan experience
risks.description: Alex Lasry, CEO of the New York-New Jersey Host Committee for the 2026 FIFA World Cup, said he is focused on fan experience as the tournament starts.

risks.title: World Cup surveillance for infections ramps up in host cities
risks.description: Public health officials in Canada, the U.S. and Mexico prepare for an influx of measles cases and food-borne illnesses on top of heat events ahead of the FIFA World Cup.

risks.title: 6 Quebecers are on Canada’s World Cup team. Their families are freaking out — in a good way
risks.description: Six players on Canada’s roster for the FIFA World Cup have roots in Quebec. They followed different, winding paths to get to the same spot: on soccer's biggest stage wearing Canada’s colours. As they focus on the job ahead of them, friends and families who he…

risks.title: Get set for kickoff! Canada's 1st FIFA World Cup match gets underway today
risks.description: The wait is over: you can finally catch Toronto’s first FIFA World Cup 2026 match today at 3 p.m. when Canada goes up against Bosnia-Herzegovina.

risks.title: FIFA World Cup: USA face 'very tough' Paraguay test in opener
risks.description: Pochettino expects a "very tough game" against Paraguay, praising their aggression and discipline.

risks.title: Protesters clash with police during World Cup opening match
risks.description: Protesters and police clashed outside Mexico City’s Azteca Stadium just before the FIFA World Cup’s opening match.

risks.title: When and Where is Canada’s World Cup opening ceremony, everything we know
risks.description: Canada are one of the three host nations at the 2026 World Cup and kick off their campaign on Friday, June 12. The tournament got underway on Thursday in Mexico, with another of the co-hosts securing a 2-0 win over South Africa.
